checks.detail: 7 deterministic cases cover all 7 mandatory planes with stable IDs and verified digests
every mandatory case declares deterministic=true and network_allowed=false
selected 7 sanitized deterministic cases; shard=None; network_access=false

proof_limitations: Corpus validation and report completeness do not prove Ferric feature parity.
Live canaries are opt-in nondeterministic observations and never satisfy offline deterministic acceptance.
The generated profile inventories pinned oracle surfaces; later compatibility rows remain missing features until implemented and compared.
